# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
    "parameters": {},
    "variables": {
        "location":"[resourceGroup().location]",
        "vnetName": "[concat(variables('location'), 'VNet')]",
        "subnetRef': "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), 'default')]"
    },
    "resources": [
      {
          "type" : "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
          "apiVersion" : "2019-06-01",
          "name" : "[parameters('networkSecurityGroupName')]",
          "location": "[variables('location')]",
          "properties": {
              "securityRules": [
                {
                  "name": "AllowRDP",
                  "properties": {
                    "description": "Allow RDP",
                    "protocol": "TCP",
                    "sourcePortRange": "*",
                    "destinationPortRange": "3389",
                    "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
                    "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
                    "access": "Allow",
                    "priority": 101,
                    "direction": "Inbound"
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "AllowSSH",
                  "properties": {
                    "description": "Allow SSH",
                    "protocol": "TCP",
                    "sourcePortRange": "*",
                    "destinationPortRange": "22",
                    "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
                    "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
                    "access": "Allow",
                    "priority": 102,
                    "direction": "Inbound"
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "AllowHTTP",
                  "properties": {
                    "description": "Allow HTTP",
                    "protocol": "TCP",
                    "sourcePortRange": "*",
                    "destinationPortRange": "80",
                    "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
                    "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
                    "access": "Allow",
                    "priority": 103,
                    "direction": "Inbound"
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "AllowHTTPS",
                  "properties": {
                    "description": "Allow HTTPS",
                    "protocol": "TCP",
                    "sourcePortRange": "*",
                    "destinationPortRange": "443",
                    "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
                    "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
                    "access": "Allow",
                    "priority": 104,
                    "direction": "Inbound"
                  }
                },
              ]
          }
      }
    ],
    "outputs": {}
}
